R Notebook

library(fixest)
library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(lmerTest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(fixest)
library(useful)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

source('emileRegs.R')

Data

dataTC <- read_stata('raw data/full_geoid_pair_panel.dta')

colnames(dataTC)
 [1] "from_geoid"                "to_geoid"                  "move_year"                
 [4] "migration"                 "predict"                   "geoid_pair"               
 [7] "damage"                    "count2"                    "total_storms"             
[10] "total_storms_fema"         "home_total_storms"         "home_total_storms_fema"   
[13] "storms_that_year"          "storms_that_year_fema"     "storm"                    
[16] "storm_fema"                "state_fips"                "year"                     
[19] "from_median_hh_income"     "from_percap_income"        "from_hh_below_poverty"    
[22] "from_hh_income_L10"        "from_hh_income_1015"       "from_hh_income_1520"      
[25] "from_hh_income_2025"       "from_hh_income_2530"       "from_hh_income_3035"      
[28] "from_hh_income_3540"       "from_hh_income_4045"       "from_hh_income_4550"      
[31] "from_hh_income_5060"       "from_hh_income_6075"       "from_hh_income_75100"     
[34] "from_hh_income_100125"     "from_hh_income_125150"     "from_hh_income_150"       
[37] "from_black_pop"            "from_white_pop"            "from_hispanic_pop"        
[40] "to_median_hh_income"       "to_percap_income"          "to_hh_below_poverty"      
[43] "to_hh_income_L10"          "to_hh_income_1015"         "to_hh_income_1520"        
[46] "to_hh_income_2025"         "to_hh_income_2530"         "to_hh_income_3035"        
[49] "to_hh_income_3540"         "to_hh_income_4045"         "to_hh_income_4550"        
[52] "to_hh_income_5060"         "to_hh_income_6075"         "to_hh_income_75100"       
[55] "to_hh_income_100125"       "to_hh_income_125150"       "to_hh_income_150"         
[58] "to_black_pop"              "to_white_pop"              "to_hispanic_pop"          
[61] "gdp2019"                   "mi_to_county"              "totaldamage"              
[64] "approvedforfemaassistance" "totalapprovedihpamount"    "repairreplaceamount"      
[67] "rentalamount"              "otherneedsamount"          "share_approved"           
[70] "tot_pop"                   "_merge"                   
dataTC$from_geoid <- ifelse(nchar(dataTC$from_geoid) == 4,
                            paste0("0", dataTC$from_geoid),
                            dataTC$from_geoid)
dataTC <- dataTC %>% select(
    from_geoid,
    move_year,storm,
    approvedforfemaassistance) %>% 
  distinct()


# 3. Request county real GDP (CAGDP2 = real GDP, chained dollars)

beaKey <- '1D7A5FF9-69D7-403F-B74A-9F6B4C7B2424'
req <- list(
  'UserID' = beaKey,
  'Method' = 'GetData',
  'datasetname' = 'Regional',
  'TableName' = 'CAGDP2',     # Real GDP by county
  'GeoFIPS' = 'COUNTY',       # All US counties
  'Year' = 'ALL',
    'LineCode' = '1'
)


req <- list(
  'UserID' = beaKey,
  'Method' = 'GetData',
  'datasetname' = 'Regional',
  'TableName' = 'CAINC1',     # Real GDP by county
  'GeoFIPS' = 'COUNTY',       # All US counties
  'Year' = 'ALL',
    'LineCode' = '1'
)

inc_raw <- beaGet(req)


#  Clean BEA GDP data
gdp_df <- gdp_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("DataValue_"),
    names_to = "year_col",
    values_to = "gdp"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(str_extract(year_col, "\\d{4}")),
    county_id = GeoFips,
    county_name = GeoName
  ) %>%
  select(
    year,
    county_id,
    county_name,
    gdp
  )


inc_df <- inc_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("DataValue_"),
    names_to = "year_col",
    values_to = "income"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(str_extract(year_col, "\\d{4}")),
    county_id = GeoFips,
    county_name = GeoName
  ) %>%
  select(
    year,
    county_id,
    county_name,
    income
  )

econ_df <- inc_df %>%
  left_join(gdp_df, by = c("year", "county_id", "county_name"))

#. Load county FIPS + names from tidycensus
data("fips_codes")

county_names <- fips_codes %>%
  transmute(
    state,
    state_code,
    county,
    county_id = paste0(state_code, county_code),
  )

#. Merge GDP with county names
county_gdp_panel <- econ_df %>%
  left_join(county_names, by = "county_id") %>%
  relocate(state, county, .after = county_id) %>%
  arrange(year, county_id)

#get gdp diff by county
county_gdp_panel <- county_gdp_panel %>%
  arrange(county_id, year) %>%  # safer than group_by(..) + arrange separately
  group_by(county_id) %>%
  mutate(
    loggdp     = log(gdp),
    loggdp_lag = lag(loggdp),
    gdp_diff   = loggdp - loggdp_lag,
    loginc    = log(income),
    loginc_lag = lag(loginc),
    inc_diff  = loginc - loginc_lag,
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

county_gdp_panel$GEOID <- county_gdp_panel$county_id

counties <- counties(cb = TRUE)    #
states <- states(cb = TRUE)   

df_map <- counties %>%
  left_join(county_gdp_panel, by = "GEOID")

data <- county_gdp_panel %>%
  left_join(dataTC, by = c("GEOID" = "from_geoid", "year" = "move_year"))
  

df_chaz <- read_csv('raw data/df_migration_hurricane.csv')

#merge with gdp data

data_tc <- data %>%
  left_join(df_chaz, by = c("GEOID", "year"))
data_tc$decade <- floor(data_tc$year / 10) * 10


data_tc$avg_gustW_peak <- ifelse(is.na(data_tc$avg_gustW_peak), 0, data_tc$avg_gustW_peak)
data_tc$avg_sustW_max <-ifelse(is.na(data_tc$avg_sustW_max), 0, data_tc$avg_sustW_max)
data_tc$fema_assistance <- ifelse(is.na(data_tc$approvedforfemaassistance), 0, data_tc$approvedforfemaassistance)



#add first diff of log income and storm
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(county_id) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    gust_q95 = quantile(max_gustW_peak, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    sust_q95 = quantile(max_sustW_max, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    gust_p95 = ifelse(max_gustW_peak >= gust_q95, 1, 0),
    sust_p95 = ifelse(max_sustW_max >= sust_q95, 1, 0),
    gust_20 = ifelse(max_gustW_peak >20 , 1, 0),
    sust_20 = ifelse(max_sustW_max > 20, 1, 0),
  ) %>%
  ungroup() 

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(time  = year, time2 = year^2, decade = 10*floor(year/10),
        period = case_when(
          year <2005 ~ "1992-2005",
          year >=2006 ~ "2006-2019"
        )) %>% 
  filter(year<=2019) %>% 
  filter(gdp >0 & income>0)

MAPS

years <- sort(unique(data$year))

for (yr in years) {
  
  # 1. Filter one year, summarize by county (optional but keeps one row per GEOID)
  df_sum <- data %>%
    filter(year == yr) 
  
  # 2. Join summarized values back to geometry
  df_plot <- counties %>%
    left_join(df_sum, by = "GEOID")
  
  # 3. Plot 
  p <- ggplot(df_plot) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = gdp_diff),color=alpha('gray',0.5),linewidth=0.2) +
    scale_fill_stepsn(
      colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdYlBu")(5),
      breaks  = c(  -0.15,-0.05, -0.025, -0.01, 0.01, 0.025, 0.05, 0.15),
      limits  = c(-0.15, 0.15),
        labels  = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), 
      na.value = "grey90"
    )  +
    geom_sf(data = states, fill = NA, color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
    labs(
      title = paste("County GDP", yr),
      fill  = "GDP growth YoY"
    ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-135, -65),
    ylim = c(24, 50),
    expand=FALSE
  )  +
    theme_void()
  
  print(p)
}

LP IRF

fe <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ storm  | 
    county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year ,
  data = data_tc,
  vcov = DK ~ year
)

summary(fe)
OLS estimation, Dep. Var.: gdp_diff
Observations: 6,426
Fixed-effects: county_id: 378,  year: 17
Varying slopes: time (county_id): 378,  time2 (county_id): 378
Standard-errors: Driscoll-Kraay (L=2) 
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
RMSE: 0.070747     Adj. R2: 0.025532
                 Within R2: 6.225e-4
irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "storm",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
) %>% mutate(type = "Distributed Lag")

irfs_wind_lp <- lp_panel(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "storm",
  horizon = 10,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% mutate(type = "Local Projection")

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(irfs_wind_cumulative, irfs_wind_lp)


# Plot both as a facet
ggplot(irfs_combined, aes(x = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lag, horizon), 
                          y = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", cumulative_effect, irf_mean))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = 'cornflowerblue') +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lower_ci, irf_down), 
                  ymax = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", upper_ci, irf_up)), 
              alpha = 0.2, fill = 'cornflowerblue', color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(x = "Years after Treatment",
       y = "Effect on Income Growth",
       title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on Income Growth") +
  facet_wrap(~type, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "inc_diff",
  main_var = "storm",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
) %>% mutate(type = "Distributed Lag")

irfs_wind_lp <- lp_panel(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loginc",
  main_var = "storm",
  horizon = 10,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% mutate(type = "Local Projection")

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(irfs_wind_cumulative, irfs_wind_lp)


# Plot both as a facet
ggplot(irfs_combined, aes(x = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lag, horizon), 
                          y = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", cumulative_effect, irf_mean))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = 'cornflowerblue') +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lower_ci, irf_down), 
                  ymax = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", upper_ci, irf_up)), 
              alpha = 0.2, fill = 'cornflowerblue', color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(x = "Years after Treatment",
       y = "Effect on Income Growth",
       title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on Income Growth") +
  facet_wrap(~type, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

results_lp1 <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "storm",
  interact_var = "decade",
  horizon = 5,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(model = "GDP")

results_lp2 <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc ,
  outcome = "loginc",
  main_var = "storm",
  interact_var = "decade",
  horizon = 5,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(model = "Income") 

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(results_lp1, results_lp2)


# Plot both
ggplot( irfs_combined, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after Treatment",
    y = "Effect on GDP",
    title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on GDP"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~model, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

results_lp1 <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loginc",
  main_var = "storm",
  interact_var = "state",
  horizon = 5,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(model = "Income")

results_lp2 <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc ,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "storm",
  interact_var = "state",
  horizon = 5,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + state^year",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(model = "GDP") 

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(results_lp1, results_lp2)


# Plot both
ggplot( irfs_combined, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after Treatment",
    y = "Effect on GDP",
    title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on GDP"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~model, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

results_lp1 <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loginc",
  main_var = "storm",
  interact_var = "period",
  horizon = 6,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + year^state",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(model = "Income")

results_lp2 <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc ,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "storm",
  interact_var = "decade",
  horizon = 6,
  fe = "county_id[time] + county_id[time2] + year + year^state",
  panel_id = c("county_id", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(model = "GDP") 

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(results_lp1, results_lp2)


# Plot both
ggplot( irfs_combined, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after Treatment",
    y = "Effect on GDP",
    title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on GDP"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~model, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

DiD Katrina

katrina_states <- c("FL", "LA", "MS", "AL", "AK", "SC", "TN")

katrina_counties <- data_tc %>%
  filter(
    state %in% katrina_states,
    year == 2005,
    storm > 0
  ) %>%
  distinct(county_id) %>%
  pull(county_id)

# -----------------------------
# Pre-Katrina characteristics
# -----------------------------
pre_katrina_data <- data_tc %>%
  filter(year < 2005)

county_states <- data_tc %>%
  distinct(county_id, state)

trend_level <- pre_katrina_data %>%
  group_by(county_id) %>%
  filter(n() >= 3) %>%
  summarise(
    trend_gdp = coef(lm(loggdp ~ year))[["year"]],
    level_gdp = mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(county_states, by = "county_id") %>%
  mutate(
    trend_z = as.numeric(scale(trend_gdp)),
    level_z = as.numeric(scale(level_gdp))
  )

# -----------------------------
# Katrina target (county avg)
# -----------------------------
target <- trend_level %>%
  filter(county_id %in% katrina_counties) %>%
  summarise(
    trend_z = mean(trend_z, na.rm = TRUE),
    level_z = mean(level_z, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# -----------------------------
# Donor counties (non-Katrina)
# -----------------------------
matched_donors <- trend_level %>%
  filter(!county_id %in% katrina_counties) %>%
  mutate(
    dist = sqrt(
      (trend_z - target$trend_z)^2 +
      (level_z - target$level_z)^2
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(dist)

matched_donors %>% slice(1:25)
donor_counties <- matched_donors %>%
  slice(1:150) %>%
  pull(county_id)

plot_df <- data_tc %>%
  filter(
    county_id %in% c(katrina_counties, donor_counties),
    year >= 2000, year <= 2020
  ) %>%
  group_by(county_id) %>%
  mutate(
    gdp_2004  = loggdp[year == 2004][1],
    gdp_index = 100 * exp(loggdp - gdp_2004)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    group = case_when(
      county_id %in% katrina_counties ~ "Katrina counties",
      county_id %in% donor_counties   ~ "Donor counties"
    )
  )

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x = year, y = gdp_index,
           group = county_id,
           color = group)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(plot_df, year <= 2004),
    aes(group = group),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2005,
             linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.8,
             color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Katrina counties" = "#e31a1c",
    "Donor counties"  = "#1f78b4"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "GDP (Index, 2004 = 100)",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")


donor_counties <- matched_donors %>%
  slice(1:150) %>%
  pull(county_id)

treated_counties <- trend_level %>%
  filter(county_id %in% katrina_counties) %>%
  pull(county_id)

county_groups <- tibble(
  county_id = c(treated_counties, donor_counties),
  group = c(
    rep("Katrina counties", length(treated_counties)),
    rep("Donor counties",   length(donor_counties))
  )
)

df_plot <- counties %>%                     # counties = sf object
  left_join(county_groups, by = c("GEOID" = "county_id")) %>%
  mutate(group = if_else(is.na(group), "Other counties", group))

ggplot(df_plot) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = group), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Katrina counties" = "#e31a1c",
    "Donor counties"   = "#1f78b4",
    "Other counties"   = "grey90"
  )) +
  geom_sf(data = states, fill = NA, color = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-130, -70),
    ylim = c(24, 50),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(fill = "") +
  theme_void()


# -----------------------------
# Define Katrina treatment
# -----------------------------
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    katrina = ifelse(year >= 2005 & county_id %in% katrina_counties, 1, 0)
  )

donor_counties <- matched_donors %>%
  slice(1:200) %>%
  pull(county_id)

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  filter(county_id %in% c(katrina_counties, donor_counties)) %>%
  group_by(county_id) %>%
  mutate(
    g = ifelse(any(katrina == 1), min(year[katrina == 1]), 9999)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(GEOID = as.numeric(county_id))

# -----------------------------
# Callaway & Sant’Anna
# -----------------------------
cs <- att_gt(
  yname  = "loggdp",
  tname  = "year",
  idname = "GEOID",
  gname  = "g",
  data   = data_tc,
  panel  = TRUE,
  allow_unbalanced_panel = TRUE
)

cs_df <- aggte(cs, type = "dynamic") %>%
  with(data.frame(
    event_time = egt,
    att        = att.egt,
    se         = se.egt,
    method     = "Callaway & Sant’Anna"
  )) %>%
  filter(event_time >= -3 & event_time <= 13)

# -----------------------------
# LP-DiD
# -----------------------------
reg <- lpdid(
  data_tc,
  window = c(-3, 13),
  y = "loggdp",
  outcome_lags = 0,
  unit_index = "GEOID",
  time_index = "year",
  controls = "county_id:time + county_id:time2",
  treat_status = "katrina"
)

lpdid_df <- as.data.frame(reg$coeftable) %>%
  mutate(
    event_time = -3:13,
    att        = Estimate,
    se         = `Std. Error`,
    method     = "LP-DiD"
  ) %>%
  select(event_time, att, se, method)

# -----------------------------
# de Chaisemartin & D’Haultfœuille
# -----------------------------
ch_df <- did_multiplegt_dyn(
  df        = data_tc,
  outcome   = "loggdp",
  group     = "county_id",
  time      = "year",
  treatment = "katrina",
  trends_lin = F,
  effects   = 13,  # post-treatment
  placebo   = 3,   # pre-treatment
  cluster   = "county_id"
)$plot$data %>%
  filter(Time >= -3 & Time <= 13) %>%
  transmute(
    event_time = Time,
    att        = Estimate,
    se         = (UB.CI - LB.CI) / (2 * 1.96),
    method     = "de Chaisemartin & D’Haultfœuille"
  )


# -----------------------------
# Sun & Abraham
# -----------------------------
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(county_id) %>%
  mutate(
    treat_year = ifelse(any(katrina == 1), min(year[katrina == 1]), 9999),
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

did_sunab <- feols(
  loggdp ~ sunab(treat_year, year) | county_id + year,
  data = data_tc,
  vcov = ~county_id
)

sunab_df <- broom::tidy(did_sunab) %>%
  filter(grepl("year::", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    event_time = as.numeric(sub(".*::", "", term)),
    att        = estimate,
    se         = std.error,
    method     = "Sun & Abraham"
  ) %>%
  filter(event_time >= -3 & event_time <= 13) %>%
  select(event_time, att, se, method)

# -----------------------------
# Combine all
# -----------------------------
es_all <- bind_rows(cs_df, lpdid_df, ch_df, sunab_df) %>%
  mutate(
    period = ifelse(event_time < 0, "Pre-treatment", "Post-treatment"),
    calendar_year = 2005 + event_time
  )

# -----------------------------
# Faceted event-study plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(es_all,
       aes(x = calendar_year, y = att,
           color = period, fill = period)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2005, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = att - 1.96 * se,
                  ymax = att + 1.96 * se),
              alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ method, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Pre-treatment"  = "#1f78b4",
    "Post-treatment" = "#e31a1c"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Pre-treatment"  = "#1f78b4",
    "Post-treatment" = "#e31a1c"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "GDP % variation",
    color = "",
    fill  = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

NA
NA

lpdid(data_tc, window = c(-3, 15), y = "loggdp",outcome_lags = 0,
      controls = "county_id:time + county_id:time2",
      unit_index = "county_id", time_index = "year",
      treat_status = "storm") -> reg

reg_df <- as.data.frame(reg$coeftable)

reg_df$event_time <- -3:15

lpdid_plot <- reg_df %>%
  transmute(
    event_time,
    att = Estimate,
    se  = `Std. Error`,
    period = ifelse(event_time < 0, "Pre", "Post")
  )


ggplot(lpdid_plot, aes(x = event_time, y = att,
                    color = period, fill = period)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = att - 1.96 * se,
                  ymax = att + 1.96 * se),
              alpha = 0.25, color = NA) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",  # blue
                                "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +  # red
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre" = "#1f78b4",
                               "Post" = "#e31a1c")) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Event Time (relative year)",
    y = "ATT",
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
